calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-07-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR THURS, APR-03-2008: DANIEL STERN, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR DEFENDANT MICHAEL JAMES THIS DATE.

COUNSEL STERN INFORMS THE CLERK THE MATTER IS SETTLED AND SHOULD BE STRICKEN FROM THE D-218 SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR, WHICH IS DONE. NO SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE TAKES PLACE.

NO SETTLEMENT DOCUMENTATION IS FILED; NO FAX RE ANY SETTLEMENT IS RECEIVED BY DEPT. 206, AS OF FRIDAY, APR-04-08, BY 4:15 P.M.; THE TRIAL DATE REMAINS FOR MONDAY, APR-07-2008. THE CLERK NOTIFYS THE OFFICE OF COUNSEL STERN, NOTIFYING CO-COUNSEL VIA TELEPHONE THAT THE MATTER REMAINS ON D-206 CALENDAR; THE CLERK ALSO NOTIFYS COUNSEL STERN AT HIS CELL PHONE NUMBER (PROVIDED BY CO-COUNSEL AT HIS OFFICE) THAT THE MATTER REMAINS FOR TRIAL ON MONDAY, APR-07-08, IN DEPARTMENT 206.

CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (218).
